ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "tenure" INTEGER /* Tenure of the customer with the bank */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance in the customer's account */,
  "has_credit_card" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has a credit card */,
  "is_active_member" INTEGER /* Whether the customer is an active member */,
  "estimated_salary" REAL /* Estimated salary of the customer */,
  "exited" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has exited the bank */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last login */,
  "average_transaction_value" REAL /* Average value of the customer's transactions */,
  "preferred_communication_channel" TEXT /* Preferred communication channel of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographies" (
  "geography_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geography */,
  "geography_name" TEXT /* Name of the geography (country) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the geography */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the geography */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geography_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_geographies" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "geography_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geography (country) the customer belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "geography_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_genders" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gender the customer identifies with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate associated with the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_products" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the customer is subscribed to */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date the customer subscribed to the product */,
  "product_status" TEXT /* Status of the product for the customer */,
  "product_usage" TEXT /* Usage of the product by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_cards" (
  "credit_card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit card */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the credit card belongs to */,
  "card_number" TEXT /* Card number of the credit card */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the credit card */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit associated with the credit card */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of credit card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_cards_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction */,
  "transaction_category" TEXT /* Category of the transaction */,
  "transaction_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_history" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_activity" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "account_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the account activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of account activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "account_activity_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the marketing campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_channel" TEXT /* Channel used for the marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the marketing campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_campaigns" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the customer responded to the campaign */,
  "campaign_response" TEXT /* Response of the customer to the campaign */,
  "campaign_conversion" INTEGER /* Whether the customer converted as a result of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the prediction is about */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_behavior" TEXT /* Predicted behavior of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
